title: PS' Broken Moon
description:
Replaces the moon with a destroyed variant, for whatever purpose you might want!

This resource pack was originally created for a cancelled (now back in production) Minecraft server with my friends.
body:
# Broken Moon

A resourcepack that just destroys the moon, while keeping it as vanilla as possible.

## Origin

Broken Moon was originally created for _PuddleSpout's NightLight SMP_. 
It was a modded SMP in which during the third season of the story, the moon was infested with dark creatures.
Players had to band together to launch charges into the heart of the moon, destroying the creatures and the moon with it.
